title: Dubai Police bust 'luxury car beggar', arrest 37 beggars of various nationalities amid crackdown
summary_full: Dubai Police are cracking down on beggars during Ramadan. Authorities have arrested dozens of people exploiting the holy month's charitable spirit. This crackdown is part of an annual campaign to prevent illegal solicitation. Similar efforts are underway across the UAE. Residents are urged to donate through official charities to ensure aid reaches those truly in need.
